name: @forgeax/preview
description: Minimal Vite host that loads a GameEntry template and renders it in-browser (createApp + loadGame). Local smoke host for templates/game-default.

bundle-size.reason: preview is a game-template host; bundle size is downstream of the loaded template

fps.reason: preview FPS is content-dependent; engine-level FPS tracked at hello-cube / hello-app

bench.reason: no engine-level bench surface in preview host

gate.reason: e2e gate is the central vitest browser project (preview.browser.test.ts, run by pnpm test:browser in the vitest-browser CI job), not a per-package smoke command
